proven.claim: Proven: "Options:" header (550) executes immediately after the second
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 550
; Proven: "Options:" header (550) executes immediately after the second
; separator (549) — sequential, no intervening branch.
(declare-const stmt_549_fired Int)
(declare-const stmt_550_fired Int)
(assert (= stmt_549_fired 1))
(assert (= stmt_550_fired stmt_549_fired))
(assert (not (= stmt_550_fired 1)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — "Options:" header cannot be skipped
